specs.name: resonance_kling_match
specs.description: Resonant match sound that echoes instead of bursting; core gameplay feedback for successful stone matches
specs.context: Plays when two or more stones match in the core gameplay loop
specs.source_reference: Sound-Prinzip (DriveAI Swarm Factory), Anti-Standard-Regeln (VERBOTE), Core Loop / Match-3 (S006)

specs.name: cascade_tone_rising
specs.description: Ascending tones during stone cascades that signal success; part of the adaptive sound layer
specs.context: Plays during stone fall cascades in the core gameplay loop
specs.source_reference: Sound-Prinzip (DriveAI Swarm Factory), Core Loop / Match-3 (S006)

specs.name: movement_whoosh_drag
specs.description: Very quiet whoosh sound during stone drag movements; subtle feedback for player action
specs.context: Plays when player drags stones during gameplay

specs.name: snap_feedback_stone
specs.description: Medium snap sound when stones lock into place after a valid move
specs.context: Plays when a stone snaps into place during gameplay
specs.source_reference: Touch-Reaktion (DriveAI Swarm Factory), Feedback-Prinzip (DriveAI Swarm Factory)

specs.name: rumble_cascade_combo
specs.description: Deep rumble that fades like a tuning fork after cascades; intensity scales with combo size (3-match=80ms, 5-match=200ms)
specs.context: Plays after successful cascade combos in the core gameplay loop
specs.source_reference: Feedback-Prinzip (DriveAI Swarm Factory), Core Loop / Match-3 (S006)

specs.name: stone_touch_echo
specs.description: Single crystal-like tone that forms the EchoMatch logo during splash screen; heartbeat-like echo on slow connections
specs.context: Plays during splash screen animation when app loads
specs.source_reference: W2 Der lebendige Splash (DriveAI Swarm Factory)

specs.name: special_stone_bomb
specs.description: Deep booming sound for bomb special stones
specs.context: Plays when bomb special stones are activated

specs.name: special_stone_line_clearer
specs.description: High sweeping sound for line-clearer special stones
specs.context: Plays when line-clearer special stones are activated

specs.name: special_stone_color_bomb
specs.description: Short harmonic chord sequence for color-bomb special stones
specs.context: Plays when color-bomb special stones are activated

specs.name: tick_drag_start
specs.description: Light ticking sound when stone drag starts; first layer of three-part haptic+audio feedback
specs.context: Plays when player starts dragging a stone in the core gameplay loop
specs.source_reference: Feedback-Prinzip (DriveAI Swarm Factory), Touch-Reaktion (DriveAI Swarm Factory)

specs.name: ambient_field_pulse
specs.description: Adaptive ambient sound layer that breathes with gameplay tempo; slow moves = deep calm ambient, fast moves = rhythmic tempo
specs.context: Continuous background sound that adapts to player's gameplay tempo

specs.name: social_light_pulse
specs.description: Ambient light pulse on friend avatars in the level map; second color (amber) for challenge invitations
specs.context: Plays when friends are active on the level map

specs.name: story_transition_breath
specs.description: Slow breathing transitions for story moments; organic textures with space between sounds

specs.name: golden_screen_shift
specs.description: 1.5-second golden color shift of the entire screen during reward screens
specs.context: Plays during reward screens after level completion

specs.name: npc_comment_appear
specs.description: Sound when Story-NPC appears in Home Hub with contextual comment
specs.context: Plays when Story-NPC appears after a lost level

specs.name: consent_rising_card
specs.description: Sound for rising consent card in DSGVO/legal screens
specs.context: Plays when consent card rises in legal screens

specs.name: error_neutral_feedback
specs.description: Neutral feedback for impossible moves; stone bounces back without negative sound
specs.context: Plays when player attempts impossible moves
